name: David Lucas
bio: David Lucas is an American stand-up comedian from Macon, Georgia, known for his sharp roasting and quick-witted joke writing. He is a Hall of Fame regular on the Kill Tony podcast and headlines his own touring shows. He hosts the podcast Fishing with David Lucas.

timeline.ev: Becomes a Kill Tony regular and Hall of Famer
Releases the special UNCANCELLABLE filmed at the Comedy Mothership

bits.t: Controversial Joke Infuriates Crowd, Show Spirals Out of Control

bits.yt_title: Controversial Joke Infuriates Crowd, Show Spirals Out of Control | David Lucas Stand Up Comedy
